Storyline: A young wizard attends a magical school and battles dark forces.
A vigilante hero fights crime and faces his greatest enemy in Gotham.
A skilled thief enters dreams to steal secrets and plant ideas.
A love story unfolds aboard a doomed ocean liner.
A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion.
A team of astronauts travels through a wormhole to save humanity.
A group of superheroes unite to fight a powerful villain.
Scientists clone dinosaurs leading to chaos in a theme park.
Two sisters struggle with magic powers and the bond of family.
A man imprisoned for life finds hope and friendship.
